title: Powerhouse source configuration
description: Project-root powerhouse.config.json: the developer-edited build manifest read by the `ph` CLI and Vite plugins.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor autocomplete. Set to the GitHub-hosted schema URL.

logLevel.description: Log level for CLI commands and the reactor.

documentModelsDir.description: Path to the project's document model definitions.

importScriptsDir.description: Path to the project's import scripts.

skipFormat.description: When true, codegen skips Prettier formatting on generated files.

interactive.description: Run CLI commands in interactive mode where applicable.

watch.description: Watch source files and rerun on changes.

port.description: Port the reactor HTTP server listens on.

https.description: Enable HTTPS. `true` for self-signed; object with key/cert paths for custom TLS.

enabled.description: Master toggle for the auth subsystem.

port.description: Port the switchboard HTTP server listens on.
Port the studio dev server listens on.

openBrowser.description: Open a browser tab on studio start.

packages.description: Powerhouse packages this project depends on. Shape is shared with the runtime config.

version.description: Exact version (registry providers) or omit to take latest.

provider.description: Where Connect should resolve the package from at runtime.

url.description: Override URL for non-registry providers (e.g. github tarball).

packageRegistryUrl.description: Project-wide package registry endpoint. Used by `ph install` / `ph publish` / `ph registry-login` and Switchboard, and copied verbatim into the runtime config so the Connect SPA's Package Manager UI reads the same registry.

connect.description: Connect-specific UI customisations. Copied verbatim into the runtime config at build time.

appName.description: Browser tab title and any in-app brand text. Defaults to 'Powerhouse Connect'.

homeBackground.description: Hero image on the empty home screen. URL or path to override; null or omitted uses the bundled default image.

logLevel.description: Log level applied by Connect's logger at boot. Affects browser-side output only.

basePath.description: Base path Connect is mounted under (e.g. '/connect' for subpath deploys). Normalised at runtime to start and end with '/'. Defaults to the build-time BASE_URL.

packages.description: Runtime behaviour for the Connect package manager (separate from top-level `packages[]`, which lists which packages to load).

externalEnabled.description: When false, Connect refuses to load any package that wasn't bundled at build time. Affirmative replacement for the legacy PH_CONNECT_EXTERNAL_PACKAGES_DISABLED env var.

liveReload.description: When true, Connect subscribes to the static-mode `/__packages` SSE channel so live publishes flow into the running tab without a page reload. Only works under hosting that serves this channel (e.g. ph-clint static mode).

allowAddDrive.description: When false, the SPA hides the 'add drive' affordance entirely (top-level). Per-section overrides live in `sections.{remote,local}.allowAdd`.

defaultDrives.description: Drives the SPA auto-connects to on first load. Each must specify a URL; name and icon are optional overrides.

preserveStrategy.description: Strategy applied when defaultDrives change between deploys. 'preserve-all' keeps user-added drives untouched; 'preserve-by-url-and-detach' detaches removed default drives. No schema default — opt-in only.

sections.description: Per-section visibility and affordance toggles. `remote` covers what was historically split into 'public' + 'cloud'; `local` is browser-local drives.

remote.description: Visibility and add/delete affordances for a drive section in the sidebar.

enabled.description: When false, the section is hidden in the sidebar.

allowAdd.description: When false, the section's 'add drive' affordance is hidden.

allowDelete.description: When false, drives in this section cannot be deleted from the UI.

local.description: Visibility and add/delete affordances for a drive section in the sidebar.

enabled.description: When false, the section is hidden in the sidebar.

allowAdd.description: When false, the section's 'add drive' affordance is hidden.

allowDelete.description: When false, drives in this section cannot be deleted from the UI.

chainId.description: CAIP-2 chain reference within the network namespace.

sentry.description: Sentry error-tracking coordinates. Set `dsn` to enable Sentry; leave `dsn` null to disable. The Sentry release tag stays build-time (stamped via Vite's `define` from WORKSPACE_VERSION) so it always matches the sourcemaps uploaded by CI.

dsn.description: Sentry DSN URL. `null` disables Sentry entirely; the SPA never loads the Sentry SDK chunk.

env.description: Sentry environment label, surfaced as the `environment` tag on every event.
